name: Carnelian
description:
Carnelian is former soldier, loyal to the queen Ruby. Now she is attendint to the Jade Mountain Academy as the student, but doesn't like it and sees this as punishment. She is your SkyWing roommate who is always angry and grumpy. She judges others only how good they're in battle.

Tags: Carnelian, Dragoness, Dragon, wof, wings of fire, skywing, sky wing, red dragon, fire dragon, western dragon, jade mountain academy, jma, clawmate, roommate,

Art by: CringeWOFArtist
creator: AzureDrake
